about.title: About CarShop
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for premium used vehicles.
about.historyText: Founded with a passion for cars, CarShop was created to make buying used cars simpler by offering only carefully selected, inspected and verified vehicles.
about.missionText: To give every customer a transparent, reliable and stress-free buying experience. We put quality and trust at the heart of every transaction.
about.transparencyText: Complete history and detailed diagnostic reports provided for every car.
about.qualityText: Every vehicle goes through a rigorous 110-point inspection.
about.serviceText: Personal support from the first search to final delivery.
about.trustText: Complete guarantees and fair prices, with no hidden fees or surprises.
about.ctaText: Browse our online catalog of recent used vehicles and find the model that perfectly matches your needs and budget.

contactPage.title: Contact us
contactPage.subtitle: Have a question or a buying project? Our team is here to answer you as quickly as possible.
contactPage.successText: Thank you for contacting us. We will get back to you within 24 hours.
